calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Sep-06-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom Conference
Jonathan Vaknin, Esq., LAW OFFICES OF JONATHAN VAKNIN, 415-871-5297, appearance@vakninlaw.com, Specially Appearing for Plaintiff BH Financial Services, Inc.
Misty Patton, 209-278-5044, mis.patton@gmail.com, Defendant in Pro Per.

Hearing held. Discussed. Not ARGUED. The Court makes the following ruling:

PLAINTIFF BH FINANCIAL SERVICES, INC. HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION is granted in part. The levying officer is directed to release $200.00 per pay period to the judgment creditor.

order is signed.
